canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating multi-hop question answering over long narrative contexts, featuring 4,000 questions with 1-4 reasoning hops across 64k-128k token excerpts from public-domain novels.
papers: SpeculatingLLMs’Chinese Training Data Pollution from Their Tokens
